display.purpose: Room and section headlines. Always Frank Ruhl Libre.

body.purpose: All body text, item names, descriptions. Heebo.

label.purpose: Category chips, eyebrow text, metadata. Tracked uppercase. Max 3 words.

editorial.purpose: AI stylist chat voice only. Cormorant Garamond italic.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Base card elevation. All .card components at rest.

shadows.name: ambient-large
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets and compartment drawers pulled up from the screen edge.

shadows.name: brass-ring
shadows.purpose: Selected state ring for item cards and active compartment tabs.

shadows.name: frost-panel
shadows.purpose: Frosted overlay panels floating over the 3D scene. Paired with backdrop-filter.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Fast start, smooth settle.

motion.name: ease-enter
motion.purpose: Elements entering the screen — panels, sheets, fade-ups.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: button hover, chip active state.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions: tab switch, card selection.

components.name: Brass Primary Button
components.description: The primary CTA. Engraved brass-plate gradient that echoes cabinet hardware.
components.css: .ds-btn-brass { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 14px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1410; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg, #E8C896 0%, #D9B47C 30%, #B8956A 60%, #8C6B42 100%); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,240,210,0.7), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(60,40,20,0.4), 0 1px 3px rgba(40,20,10,0.3); text-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,240,210,0.5); transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-brass:hover { transform: scale(1.01); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,240,210,0.8), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(60,40,20,0.4), 0 3px 8px rgba(40,20,10,0.25); } .ds-btn-brass:active { transform: scale(0.99); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(60,40,20,0.3), 0 1px 2px rgba(40,20,10,0.2); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with brass border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 12px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(184,149,106,0.5); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5C3E22; background: transparent; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(245,239,230,0.8); border-color: rgba(184,149,106,0.8); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: rgba(232,221,201,0.6); }

components.name: Wardrobe Item Card
components.description: Displays a single clothing item. Flat at rest, brass ring on selection.
components.html:
חולצת פשתן לבנה

CASUAL · קיץ
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FAF6EE; border: 1px solid rgba(184,149,106,0.25); border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px -8px rgba(60,40,20,0.2); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px -8px rgba(60,40,20,0.3); } .ds-card.ds-selected { border-color: rgba(184,149,106,0.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(184,149,106,0.4), 0 4px 16px -6px rgba(184,149,106,0.35); } .ds-card-image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: #E8DDC9; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1410; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-meta { margin: 0; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A3829; }

components.name: Frost Overlay
components.description: Light frosted panel floating over the 3D scene. Used for compartment sheets.
components.html: תוכן הפנל
components.css: .ds-frost { background: rgba(245,239,230,0.78); backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(140%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(140%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px -8px rgba(40,20,10,0.25); padding: 24px 16px; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Labels compartment type. Tracked uppercase label style.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 12px; background: #E8DDC9; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A3829; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: #F5EFE6; color: #5C3E22; } .ds-chip--active { background: #FAF6EE; border-color: rgba(184,149,106,0.6); color: #5C3E22; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(184,149,106,0.25); }

components.name: Bottom Tab Navigation
components.description: Two-tab bottom navigation bar with safe-area awareness.
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; height: 70px; background: #F5EFE6; border-top: 1px solid #E8DDC9; padding-bottom: max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom), 0px); } .ds-nav-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Heebo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #4A3829; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1); padding: 0; } .ds-nav-tab--active { color: #5C3E22; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-tab:hover { color: #5C3E22; }

narrative.overview:
WeatherWear is designed to feel like the piece of furniture that holds your whole wardrobe story: warm, intimate, present every morning without demanding attention. It doesn't try to impress. It knows what you have and tells you what to wear.

The system uses a Restrained color strategy: warm linen neutrals cover most surfaces, with a single Aged Brass accent appearing sparingly on hardware, primary actions, and selection states. The 3D walnut cabinet is the visual hero; everything in the 2D UI is designed not to compete with it.

This is not a shopping catalog, not an aspirational feed, not a generic AI chatbot.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochrome warm surface: parchment from lightest to darkest, with brass as the one accent
Serif headlines that read like a handwritten label on a drawer; sans body that disappears
Shadows tinted warm brown, never grey — everything sits in the same warm room
4px radius on all containers: restrained geometry that echoes the cabinet's lines
Frosted glass appears only on panels floating over the 3D scene, never as decoration

rules.name: The One Brass Rule
rules.body: Aged Brass (#B8956A) appears on at most 10% of any screen's surface. Its scarcity is what makes it read as hardware on the cabinet, not as a brand color.

rules.name: The No-Grey Rule
rules.body: Every shadow carries warm brown. The standard is rgba(60, 40, 20, ...) — not rgba(0, 0, 0, ...). A cold shadow on Morning Linen looks like a bug.

rules.name: The Voice Rule
rules.body: Frank Ruhl Libre is the app speaking. Cormorant Garamond italic is the stylist speaking. Never mix them on one element.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows use rgba(60, 40, 20, ...). A cold-grey shadow on this palette looks like a CSS error, not a design choice.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only in response to state. Layout regions have no shadow.

dos: Do use Aged Brass on primary buttons, active states, and hardware metaphors. Keep it below 10% of any screen's surface.
Do tint every shadow with rgba(60, 40, 20, ...). All shadows are warm.
Do use Frank Ruhl Libre for all headings and section titles.
Do use tracked uppercase (letter-spacing: 0.24em) for category labels and eyebrow text.
Do keep border-radius at 4px for all containers.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion and disable transitions when set.
Do let the 3D cabinet be the visual hero; keep 2D surfaces quiet.
donts: Don't add buy buttons, pricing, or catalog patterns. WeatherWear is not Stitch Fix or Rent the Runway.
Don't create inspirational image feeds, OOTD grids, or Pinterest-style scroll layouts.
Don't use cold grey shadows (rgba(0,0,0,...)). Every shadow carries warm brown.
Don't use Cormorant Garamond italic for UI copy, labels, or navigation.
Don't apply frosted glass to static layout surfaces. Frost is functional, not decorative.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't round containers beyond 4px. Match the cabinet's almost-sharp geometry.
Don't add border-left stripes as accent markers on list items.
